section: 2.2: Barbarian fishing, Green dragons and the Hallowed Sepulchre
stepText: Catch ~1.5k grey chins for level 55 ranging (at Soul Wars - you can take an axe to chop the nearby teaks in case you mess up your knife-log). Catch ~1.5k red chins between Kastori and Tal Teklan (TalTeklanChinSpot.png). Follow this guide for catching chins: OSRS Easy 1t Hunter Guide (In-Depth) for the methods (regardless of location and chin type). Train your ranging in the MM1 tunnels (short fuse) to level 62 (55 with grey, 55-62 with red). Make sure to equip a salve amulet (ei).
